title: A Draft U.S.-Iran Plan Is Said to Be on the Table. Here’s What to Know.
summary_full: U.S. and Iranian officials say they are closing in on the terms of a preliminary agreement. Yet sticking points, particularly over the Strait of Hormuz, remain.
summary_public: U.S. and Iranian officials say they are closing in on the terms of a preliminary agreement. Yet sticking points, particularly over the Strait of Hormuz, remain.

IR.label: neutral
